URL: https://github.com/Anuken/Mindustry
Language: java
The automation tower defense RTS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoMQ/automq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoMQ/automq
Language: java
AutoMQ is a diskless Kafka® on S3. 10x Cost-Effective. No Cross-AZ Traffic Cost. Autoscale in seconds. Single-digit ms latency. Multi-AZ Availability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DrKLO/Telegram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DrKLO/Telegram
Language: java
Telegram for Android source

Language: java
A bridge/proxy allowing you to connect to Minecraft: Java Edition servers with Minecraft: Bedrock Edition.

Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
🚀 Real-world DevOps projects for aspiring engineers — Beginner to Advanced. Covers AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, and more. Hands-on learning with step-by-step guides.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaperMC/Paper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaperMC/Paper
Language: java
The most widely used, high performance Minecraft server that aims to fix gameplay and mechanics inconsistencies

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/beam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/beam
Language: java
Apache Beam is a unified programming model for Batch and Streaming data processing.

URL: https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck
Language: java
OWASP dependency-check is a software composition analysis utility that detects publicly disclosed vulnerabilities in application dependencies.
